title: NPCIL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 330 Executive Trainee Posts
description: The Nuclear Power Corporation of India Limited (NPCIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 330 Executive Trainee posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electrical, Mechanical, Electronics, and Civil Engineering can apply for the NPCIL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here...
